item_titles: 全球开发者狂喜！Codex移除5小时限制，Fable 5订阅再延7天，有人烧token烧到住院
GPT-5.6刚发布，OpenAI安全主管就跑路了？？
OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra reportedly solves a 50-year-old math problem in under an hour
Fable gets another bump
clusters.summary: OpenAI发布GPT-5.6 Sol模型，据称在数学证明方面取得重大突破，但安全主管随后离职。同时Codex移除了使用时间限制，引发开发者热议。
clusters.title: OpenAI发布GPT-5.6及相关动态

item_titles: CogniConsole: Externalizing Inference-Time Control as a Formal Abstraction for Reliable LLM Interactions
The Harness Is Not the Model: How Far Scaffolding Takes a Weak LLM
clusters.summary: 探讨通过外部脚手架和推理时控制抽象来提升弱LLM系统可靠性的方法，强调系统设计而非仅依赖模型能力。
clusters.title: LLM脚手架与可靠性抽象

item_titles: Giving "AI slop" as feedback says as much about the commenter as the creator
LinkedIn is the undisputed king of long-form AI slop, according to a study spanning five platforms
clusters.summary: 研究显示LinkedIn等平台上AI生成的低质量内容泛滥，引发对AI内容反馈文化及信息生态的批评与反思。
clusters.title: AI生成内容泛滥引发关注

item_titles: AI agents win at Slay the Spire 2 after researchers replace growing chat logs with structured memory
Long-Horizon-Terminal-Bench: Testing the Limits of Agents on Long-Horizon Terminal Tasks with Dense Reward-Based Grading

clusters.title: AI智能体长程任务与结构化记忆

Test-Time Scaling for Small VLMs on Multilingual Visual MCQ
KV-PRM: Efficient Process Reward Modeling via KV-Cache Transfer for Multi-Agent Test-Time Scaling
HALO: Hybrid Adaptive Latent Reasoning for Language Models

clusters.title: LLM测试时自适应推理与扩展

item_titles: OpenAI CEO Altman is now "pretty sure" AI is net job-creating, which is quite the pivot from predicting mass layoffs
Why recruiters can't find workers and new grads can't find jobs (it's not AI)
clusters.summary: OpenAI CEO Altman转变态度称AI净创造就业，而分析指出招聘市场仍存在结构性错配，新毕业生求职困难并非全因AI。
clusters.title: AI对就业市场的影响与争议

item_titles: Llambda.lisp an LLM Engine in Pure Common Lisp

clusters.title: 纯Common Lisp编写的LLM引擎Llambda

item_titles: Dunning-Kruger After AI: The Gap That No Longer Closes
'Quality decays exponentially following AI arrival': Experts leaving in droves
clusters.summary: 研究和分析指出AI普及后专家和高质量贡献者正大量离开在线社区，导致知识质量呈指数级衰减，达克效应差距难以弥合。
clusters.title: AI对在线社区知识与质量的影响
